# ASImportableCollection

**Structure**

A collection of items and subcollections for use in import and export.

## Declaration

```swift
struct ASImportableCollection
```

## Overview

A collection represents a group of items such as a vault or folder.

This type is a representation of `Collection` as defined in the Credential Exchange Format (CXF) specification. You can supply a JSON representation of a CXF `Collection` to initialize an instance of this struct by using a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/JSONDecoder] and calling [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/JSONDecoder/decode(_:from:)].

## Accessing collection properties

- **id**: A unique identifier for the collection.
- **title**: The title of the collection.
- **subtitle**: The subtitle of the collection, if any.
- **items**: The items that are part of the collection.
- **ASImportableLinkedItem**: A linked item for use in import and export.
- **subcollections**: Subcollections that are part of the collection.

## Initializers

- **init(id:created:lastModified:title:subtitle:items:subcollections:)**

## Instance Properties

- **created**: The date and time when the collection was created.
- **lastModified**: The date and time when the collection was last modified.

## Accessing account properties

- **id**: A unique identifier for the account.
- **userName**: The username associated with the account.
- **email**: The email address associated with this account.
- **fullName**: The full name of the account owner, if provided.
- **collections**: The collections stored in this account.
- **items**: All items stored in the account.
- **ASImportableItem**: An item for use in import and export.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
